challenges.area: Clients are asking for AI — you can't deliver it
challenges.impact: Every time a client asks about automation or AI follow-up and you say 'we don't do that,' you're handing them a reason to look elsewhere.
When you subcontract tech builds, your margin evaporates. You're stuck being the middleman with no upside and full client accountability.

challenges.area: Lost deals to agencies with better tech
challenges.impact: Competitors who offer automation as part of their stack close faster and retain longer. You're fighting on price instead of value.
Without a reliable build partner, adding services means hiring. That's payroll, overhead, and risk — before you've seen a single dollar from the new service.

approach.body:
We build it. You brand it. Your client sees your name.

The white-label model is simple: Arcaflow builds the system end-to-end — lead capture, AI voice agent, CRM integration, alerts — and hands it over fully operational, configured in your client's accounts. You present it as your service. We stay invisible.

Phase 1 is the core system: the highest-impact, fastest-to-deploy layer. It's scoped to launch quickly, prove ROI immediately, and give you something concrete to show clients within 2–3 weeks of kickoff.

points.label: You Own the Client Relationship
points.description: You pitch, close, and manage the client. We handle the technical build. Your brand, your margin, your retention.

points.label: Phase 1 First — Expand Later
points.description: Start with the core lead automation system. Once Phase 1 is live and proving value, Phase 2 (inbound AI receptionist, after-hours handling) is a natural upsell you control.

items.activity: Webhook integration for up to 3 lead sources (forms, texts, referrals)
items.benefit: Every lead — regardless of where it comes from — enters the same automated pipeline

items.activity: AI parsing layer (GPT-4o-mini) converts raw messages into structured data
items.benefit: No more copy-pasting or manual data interpretation; the system reads and categorizes leads automatically
Clean pipeline, no confused follow-ups, no duplicate CRM records

items.activity: Retell AI voice agent configured with qualification script (damage type, urgency, contact info, homeowner status)
items.benefit: Prospect receives a call within 60 seconds of lead arrival — before they've called a competitor

items.activity: Retry logic for unanswered calls + SMS fallback
items.benefit: No lead goes cold; the system follows up automatically so your client doesn't have to

items.activity: Full call transcript saved per lead
items.benefit: Your client has a paper trail for every conversation — useful for QA, disputes, and coaching

items.activity: Auto-create contact + job record in client's CRM on every qualified lead
items.benefit: Zero manual data entry — the CRM fills itself in real time

items.activity: SMS alert to client on every lead outcome (called, qualified, unanswered, failed)
items.benefit: Client stays informed without logging in — visibility from their phone

items.activity: Error alerting for parse failures or API issues
items.benefit: Nothing breaks silently; you always know if something needs attention

items.activity: All systems built inside your client's accounts (n8n, Twilio, Retell, CRM)
items.benefit: Your client owns everything from day one — no vendor lock-in, no ongoing dependency

items.activity: Voice agent script and tone calibrated to match your client's brand
items.benefit: The AI sounds like it belongs to their business, not a generic bot
You and your client understand how the system works — no black box

timeline.phase: Part 2: AI Voice Agent Build & Script

investment.roi_framing: One closed client deal on your end recovers this investment completely. Every subsequent build costs you 25% less. This is the entry point to a repeatable service line.

bonuses.detail: We'll help you structure the pitch to your client — pricing strategy, objection handling, and how to frame the ROI. You walk into that sales call prepared.
Every subsequent system we build for your clients is priced at a 25% discount. Scale your service offering without scaling your costs.
Every credential, automation, and account lives with your client. No lock-in to us, no monthly platform fees funneled through Arcaflow. It's yours.
After go-live, choose what works for you: ongoing support retainer at $497/month, or a one-time training session so you can maintain the system independently.

next_steps: Confirm — Review scope and approve Phase 1 deliverables
Onboarding — Share client's CRM access, lead source details, and Twilio/Retell accounts
Kick-off call — 30 minutes to align on client profile, voice script tone, and Phase 1 priorities

terms.detail: 50% deposit to begin, 50% on delivery and final QA sign-off
Includes all items in Parts 1–4 above. Excludes: Phase 2 features (inbound receptionist), ongoing ad management, content production, or out-of-scope requests added after kickoff
Up to 3 rounds of QA and revision included. Additional revision rounds quoted separately
All systems are built in your client's accounts and remain their property. No Arcaflow lock-in. No recurring fees owed to us unless the optional retainer is selected
Access to client's CRM (API or admin), Twilio account or existing business number, and Retell AI account required before build begins
